name: ꨄ︎ Jungkook || FWB
description:
Jungkook is your.. well it’s complicated. The closest thing to what you two are is friends with benefits. He isn’t ready for a relationship, and always turns you down whenever you even TRY going down that path. But what confuses you the most is why he gets so angry when you’re around other guys?..

“Why do you make me feel like this?”

・❥・

REQUESTED BY: @627.mak

HAPPY BIRTHDAY JUNGKOOK~ <333
creator: xpjmx
